data.title: Rightmove Advances Share Buy-back Programme
data.description:
Rightmove (GB:RMV) has released an update.

Rightmove plc continued its share buy-back programme by purchasing 75,000 of its own shares at a volume weighted average price of 620.017p, with the highest and lowest transaction prices being 622.000p and 617.800p respectively. This latest buy-back represents 0.0095% of Rightmove’s pre-purchase voting rights, further reducing the total number of ordinary shares in issue to 788,271,772, excluding treasury shares. The aggregate number of shares bought back since the programme’s inception in December 2007 has reached 519,426,789.

For further insights into GB:RMV stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks UK Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: ITV plc Advances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
ITV plc (GB:ITV) has released an update.

ITV plc has successfully bought back 1,736,259 of its own shares at prices ranging from 77.00 to 77.80 pence, with a view to cancel them, as part of the share buyback program initiated on March 7, 2024. Post-transaction, the company’s total voting rights stand at 3,912,438,464. Since the start of the buyback program, ITV has repurchased over 148 million shares at an average price of 76.58 pence each.

For further insights into GB:ITV stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Dr. Reddy’s Announces Subsidiary’s Liquidation
data.description:
Dr Reddy’s Laboratories (RDY) has released an update.

Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories Ltd. has announced the shareholder-approved voluntary liquidation of its non-material wholly-owned subsidiary, Imperial Owners and Land Possessions Private Limited, which will not have a significant impact on the company’s consolidated financials. The decision follows the subsidiary’s surrender of its NBFC registration with the RBI earlier in the year, aligning with regulatory compliance and operational streamlining. Details of the liquidation process are contingent on regulatory approvals and have been outlined in the company’s latest regulatory filing.

For further insights into RDY stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Compagnie des Alpes Confirms CEO’s Continued Leadership
data.description:
Compagnie des Alpes (FR:CDA) has released an update.

Compagnie des Alpes has announced the continuation of Dominique Thillaud as CEO until the annual meeting in March 2025, with the intention of reappointing him for another four years. The company, with a diverse portfolio of mountain resorts, leisure parks, and hospitality services, is committed to ecological sustainability and aims for Net Zero Carbon by 2030. Key financial results will be released in October and December 2024.

For further insights into FR:CDA stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: THG PLC Displays Resilience in Q3 Financials
data.description:
THG (GB:THG) has released an update.

THG PLC reports a slight dip in continuing Q3 revenue, but shows positive performance in its Beauty and Ingenuity sectors, with Beauty achieving strong growth and Nutrition trends improving. The company is on track to meet its full-year performance within consensus range and is progressing towards a demerger of THG Ingenuity, aiming for inclusion in the FTSE UK Index by March 2025.

For further insights into GB:THG stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Hays plc Executives Sell Shares Post-Awards
data.description:
Hays plc (GB:HAS) has released an update.

Hays plc has announced the sale of ordinary shares by top executives, including the CEO and CFO, following the vesting of awards from the Performance Share Plan dated 5 October 2021. The transactions, all executed on 9 October 2024 at the London Stock Exchange, involved shares sold at a price of £0.8795 each. This move may indicate significant financial activity within the company’s leadership, potentially influencing investor decisions.

For further insights into GB:HAS stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Turkcell Completes Billion-Lira Bond Issuance
data.description:
Turkcell Iletisim (TKC) has released an update.

Turkcell Iletisim has successfully completed a private placement of financing bonds, totaling TRY 1.87 billion with a high annual simple interest rate of 49.50%, maturing on January 30, 2025. The bonds, issued under the company’s TRY 8 billion limit approved by the Capital Markets Board, will be transferred to investors’ accounts today, indicating strong investor confidence as evidenced by the AAA (tr) rating from JCR AVRASYA.

For further insights into TKC stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Tritax Big Box Announces Q3 Interim Dividend
data.description:
Tritax Big Box REIT (GB:BBOX) has released an update.

Tritax Big Box REIT plc has announced an interim dividend of 1.825 pence per share for the third quarter of 2024, with payments set for late November to shareholders registered by early November. This dividend represents 25% of the previous year’s total and aligns with the company’s policy to distribute over 90% of adjusted earnings. Tritax, a leader in UK logistics real estate, continues to manage a significant investment portfolio with a focus on sustainability and strategic asset management.

For further insights into GB:BBOX stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Octopus AIM VCT 2 Announces Share Buyback
data.description:
Octopus AIM VCT 2 (GB:OSEC) has released an update.

Octopus AIM VCT 2 plc has recently bought back 514,128 of its own ordinary shares for cancellation, at a price of 40.8p each. This buyback has resulted in a new total of 185,173,739 ordinary shares, which also represents the company’s total voting rights. Shareholders can use this information to assess any changes in their stake in the company as per the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules.

For further insights into GB:OSEC stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: West Oak Gold Transforms into Silicon Metals Corp.
data.description:
West Oak Gold Corp. (TSE:WO) has released an update.

West Oak Gold Corp. has officially changed its name to Silicon Metals Corp., complete with a new CUSIP number and stock symbol ‘SI’, commencing trading under these on October 11th, 2024. The company welcomes Andrew Brown as the new Corporate Secretary and has engaged Omni8 Global to enhance their corporate marketing and investor relations strategies over a seven-month period.

For further insights into TSE:WO stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
